caption: A man with a shaved head and a dark beard is seated in a studio with grey acoustic foam panels on the wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A professional silver microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him; the arm features the legible text "audio-technica". The man is speaking and gesturing with his right hand. In the beginning, his hand is raised and open, palms facing forward, with the motion causing a slight blur. As time progresses, his expression shifts from an open-mouthed speaking posture to a slight smile. His right hand moves downward and away from the center of the frame, becoming more blurred as it descends. He remains centered in the frame throughout, with a tattoo visible on his right forearm.
